raw:
# Weekly Performance Review — week of 2026-05-25

## Wins
- Closed Acme ($40k ARR), the largest deal this quarter.
- Activation rate up to 47% after the new onboarding flow.

## Metrics
- New ARR: $52k (+30% WoW)
- Activation: 47% (+5pts WoW)
- Support backlog: 18 tickets (-22% WoW)

## Misses
- Outbound replies fell to 6% (-3pts) — sequence fatigue.

## Focus next week
1. Ship the v2 pricing page to lift expansion revenue.
2. Rebuild the top outbound sequence to recover reply rate.
3. Close the two deals in late-stage diligence.

## Risks
- Metrics source missed Friday's sync — numbers may lag by a day.

```json
{
  "week_of": "2026-05-25",
  "wins": [
    "Closed Acme ($40k ARR), largest deal this quarter",
    "Activation up to 47% after new onboarding"
  ],
  "metrics": [
    { "name": "New ARR", "value": "$52k", "delta": "+30% WoW" },
    { "name": "Activation", "value": "47%", "delta": "+5pts WoW" },
    { "name": "Support backlog", "value": "18 tickets", "delta": "-22% WoW" }
  ],
  "misses": ["Outbound replies fell to 6% (-3pts) — sequence fatigue"],
  "focus_next_week": [
    "Ship v2 pricing page to lift expansion revenue",
    "Rebuild top outbound sequence to recover reply rate",
    "Close the two late-stage diligence deals"
  ],
  "risks": ["Metrics source missed Friday's sync — numbers may lag a day"]
}
```
